compiled_state.title: Migrate capture-review-diff.sh to shared library (HEAD-anchored)
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
Replace inline MERGE_HEAD detection (~lines 51-64) and REBASE_HEAD detection (~lines 71-93). Script is in plugins/dso/scripts/, source via: source "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")/../hooks/lib/merge-state.sh"

IMPORTANT: capture-review-diff.sh uses HEAD-anchored rebase algorithm (merge-base HEAD onto → diff merge-base..HEAD), which intentionally differs from other consumers (orig-head-anchored). Use ms_get_worktree_only_files_from_head for the rebase path, NOT ms_get_worktree_only_files.

TDD Exemption: Unit exemption #1 — substitutive refactor. Library HEAD variant replicates capture-review-diff.sh exact existing algorithm.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] No inline merge detection in executable lines
  Verify: grep -v '^\s*#' plugins/dso/scripts/capture-review-diff.sh | grep -qE '_merge_head_sha=|_merge_base=\$\(git|_rebase_onto=' && exit 1 || true
- [ ] Script sources merge-state.sh
  Verify: grep -q 'source.*merge-state.sh' plugins/dso/scripts/capture-review-diff.sh
- [ ] Existing merge-aware-diff tests pass
  Verify: bash tests/hooks/test-merge-aware-diff.sh

comments.body: AC amendment (gap analysis): capture-review-diff.sh needs merge-base SHA (not just file list) for downstream git diff commands. Use ms_get_merge_base from library. AC: verify source path resolves correctly via SCRIPT_DIR relative traversal.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 2/6: Code patterns understood ✓ - capture-review-diff.sh in plugins/dso/scripts/, uses HEAD-anchored algorithm. merge-state.sh has ms_get_worktree_only_files_from_head (HEAD-anchored) and ms_get_merge_base. Source path: $(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")/../hooks/lib/merge-state.sh resolves correctly.
comments.author: Test

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 3/6: MERGE_HEAD inline detection replaced with ms_is_merge_in_progress + ms_get_merge_base + ms_get_worktree_only_files_from_head ✓
comments.author: Test

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 4/6: REBASE_HEAD inline detection replaced with ms_is_rebase_in_progress (unified block), source path resolves correctly via SCRIPT_DIR relative traversal ✓
comments.author: Test

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 5/6: Tests pass ✓ - test-merge-aware-diff.sh 13/13 PASS, test-merge-state.sh 27/27 PASS

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: AC verification complete ✓ - All ACs pass: no inline merge detection, sources merge-state.sh, test-merge-aware-diff.sh 13/13, test-merge-state.sh 27/27. Discovered: pre-commit-ticket-gate.sh has inline MERGE_HEAD detection without sourcing merge-state.sh → created bug 2829-08b6.

comments.body: Fixed: migrated to shared merge-state.sh library
